notes: Refined the dedicated Creation Wizard workspace into a tighter, more focused UX.
Reduced the oversized hero treatment and moved Return to dashboard into a quieter top action.
Removed the empty rounded wizard container that could appear between the header and the question.
Added visible progress/stage pills and contextual labels such as Project step 1 or Routine activity 1.
Changed Back and Next controls from bare arrows to clearer button labels.
Reduced the prominence of the cancel action by changing it to a quieter Exit wizard flow.
Added card-style explanations for the initial Project/Routine choice.
Kept required-text detection so required text fields can activate Next once non-empty.
release_notes: Refines the dedicated Pathmark creation wizard workspace with a tighter header, visible progress cues, clearer Back/Next controls, quieter exit handling, card-style Project/Routine choice guidance, and removal of the empty rounded container. The repository package now includes only the latest Windows download package rather than old downloadable versions.
